evidence_summary: PG-063 delivers the Import Leads (CSV) feature as a web-layer-only vertical slice mapping to the existing lead.create path (no bulk endpoint added). Three named artifacts: lib/leads/field-mapper.ts (PURE RFC-4180 parser + formula-injection guard + header auto-detect + per-row createLeadSchema validation), components/leads/csv-importer.tsx (client component: select -> map -> import -> result state machine, sequential api.lead.create per valid row, row-level error surfacing), and app/leads/(list)/import/page.tsx (thin route shell). SECURITY (spec §4): formula-injection cells (leading = + - @ TAB CR) in FREE-TEXT fields are REJECTED as surfaced row errors (never stored/prefixed/altered) — resolved from the plan-reviewer's stored-corruption finding; email/phone excluded (a valid +phone is preserved, a =/@ payload fails emailSchema/phoneSchema). Caps: MAX_IMPORT_ROWS=1000 (over-cap file rejected WHOLE, never truncated), MAX_IMPORT_FILE_BYTES=2MiB (checked before read). Every row validated against createLeadSchema (single source of truth); invalid rows surfaced with reasons, never silently dropped; the RAW string record is sent so phoneSchema's PhoneNumber VO transform stays server-side (no VO serialised). REACHABILITY: the (list) layout gives the sidebar; an Import secondary CTA added to the lead-list PageHeader (lead-list.tsx). a11y: /leads/import added to the WCAG conformance statement (strict a11y-routes gate PASS, 180/180); route-count surfaces reconciled (sitemap-reconciliation TC-25 208->209, PAGE_MAP_AND_FLOWS.md + page-registry.md Total Pages 208->209). RED FLAG: export-path CSV injection in lib/export/csv.ts (escapeCSVField has no formula guard) filed as issue #417 + debt-ledger CSV-EXPORT-FORMULA-INJECTION-001 (out of import scope; own PR). Zero packages/ or apps/api/ change -> /stoa-domain PASS (subagent a5c95751139285a70).

notes: Web-layer-only feature (greenfield, not an extraction). Plan-reviewer subagent (a941eb6ab0ae8e81e) returned CHANGES_REQUIRED with 5 ERRORs — all resolved: (1) website/free-text formula injection switched from OWASP '-prefix-and-store to REJECT-as-row-error (prefix-and-store would write a corrupted value the unguarded export path replays); (2) VO-serialisation hazard — validateLeadRow returns ok/errors only, the importer sends the RAW LeadImportRecord so phoneSchema's PhoneNumber transform runs server-side (test asserts mutateAsync receives a string phone); (3) result-step controls tested (Back to Leads / Import another -> reset / skipped-invalid reasons); (4) mid-sequence server failure does NOT abort the loop (test: row 2 of 3 rejects, rows 1+3 imported, 1 failed shown); (5) a11y page.tsx-before-doc ordering + conformance 179->180 + the THREE page-count surfaces (TC-25 / PAGE_MAP / page-registry 208->209). WARNs resolved: partial-mapping/manual-email-map test, aria-live progress test, explicit coverage target, full alias table enumerated; Issue-10 (dependency-chains) deferred (existing web->validators edge). a11y-expert (a95ed46d41f2efcb1) PASS-WITH-NITS: 4 net-new nits FIXED in-PR (removed redundant select aria-label that overrode the <label>; conditional-render the progress <output> to avoid empty-string announcement; programmatic heading focus on select->map and map->result transitions; sr-friendly count separator); 1 pre-existing shared-component nit (PageHeader loading spinner missing aria-hidden, not exercised by PG-063) filed #419. stoa-domain (a5c95751139285a70) PASS: web->api.lead.create->domain boundary intact, no Prisma in web, createLeadSchema single source of truth, raw z.input on the wire, no API/DB/domain change. RED FLAG (brief requirement): lib/export/csv.ts escapeCSVField lacks a formula-injection guard on EXPORT — OWASP CSV injection — filed #417 + debt-ledger CSV-EXPORT-FORMULA-INJECTION-001 (export path, out of import scope, own PR per co-dependent-changes rule). Final gate is scripts/pre-ship.mjs (mirrors CI). CODEX ROUND: the codex-review gate caught 3 REAL bugs (all fixed, none waived): (1) MEDIUM missing-cache-invalidation — imports didn't refresh the leads list/stats caches (5-min staleTime + server cache tags) so imported rows weren't visible after 'Back to Leads' → runImport now invalidates utils.lead.list/stats + invalidateLeadsCache() + revalidateLeadCaches(user.id) after >=1 success (mirrors lead-list.tsx); (2) MEDIUM invalid-source-normalization — source.toUpperCase() turned 'Cold Call' into 'COLD CALL' (enum is COLD_CALL) so valid sources were rejected → added normaliseSource() (upper-case + collapse non-alphanumerics to '_'); (3) LOW wrong-import-row-number — dropping blank lines mis-numbered row errors → parseCsv now tracks physical line numbers (rowLines) and RowResult.line carries the true CSV line. +3 tests (60 total). The whole-CSV gate also forced fixing pre-existing sonarjs/slow-regex in sitemap-reconciliation.test.ts (co-dependent, the file I had to touch for the count guard). A new STATIC page also tripped the canonical-page-count net (209) across 7 design docs + content-audit JSON beyond the 3 first found — all reconciled. NOTE: PG-060/061/062 specs/plans live in the gitignored .specify working dirs; the committed evidence is this attestation.json + context_ack.json (force-added past sprint-*/attestations/** ignore, matching PG-059..062).
